title: atractylis ovata f. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylis ovata f. simplicifolia, also known as Japanese thistle or Japanese hawk's beard, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Atractylis ovata f. simplicifolia include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antioxidant, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Atractylis ovata f. simplicifolia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
